prompt: Create a surreal low-angle 35mm fashion editorial portrait of a stylish young male model standing full body in a massive seamless pastel mint green studio with curved floor-to-wall cyclorama and an exposed dark industrial ceiling visible at the top. He faces the camera with a calm, confident stance, arms relaxed, wearing an ivory cream suit with wide-leg trousers, a white satin shirt, and a cream blazer hand-painted with delicate pastel flowers and green stems. His face is covered by a centered soft rectangular blur, while his hair remains visible as short dark slicked-back hair. Surround him with exactly 11 suspended oversized white paper sheets hanging from thin nearly invisible strings: one large sheet at the top center, one large sheet on the upper left, one small sheet behind the left side, one gray-shadowed sheet mid-left, one partial sheet at the lower left edge, one narrow sheet behind his head, one large sheet upper right, one large curved sheet on the right edge, one rectangular sheet mid-right, one smaller vertical sheet lower right, and one partial sheet near the lower right edge. The papers bend softly in midair and cast bold abstract shadows. Use dramatic hard sunlight from camera-left forming a large circular spotlight glow and crisp paper silhouettes across the mint wall and the model’s suit, with subtle film grain, realistic fabric texture, muted pastel colors, vertical 9:16 composition, high-fashion magazine styling, natural shadows, and no text or watermark except a tiny white sparkle mark in the bottom-right corner.
